query: SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ORDER BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ASC

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) AS "CREATED_AT", AVG(CASE WHEN "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" >= 1 THEN "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" END) AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', 1, NOW()))) GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ASC

SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "__mb_source"."Date") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("__mb_source"."Date" AS date)) AS "Date", "__mb_source"."Customer Type" AS "Customer Type", SUM("__mb_source"."Items Sold") AS "sum" FROM (WITH tmp_user_order_dates as (
  SELECT 
    o.USER_ID,
    o.CREATED_AT,
    o.QUANTITY
  FROM 
    ORDERS o
),

tmp_prior_orders_by_date as (
  select
      tbod.USER_ID,
      tbod.CREATED_AT,
      tbod.QUANTITY,
      (select count(*) from tmp_user_order_dates tbod2 where tbod2.USER_ID = tbod.USER_ID and tbod2.CREATED_AT < tbod.CREATED_AT ) as PRIOR_ORDERS
  from tmp_user_order_dates tbod
)

select
  date_trunc('day', tpobd.CREATED_AT) as "Date",
  case when tpobd.PRIOR_ORDERS > 0 then 'Return' else 'New' end as "Customer Type",
  sum(QUANTITY) as "Items Sold"
from tmp_prior_orders_by_date tpobd
group by date_trunc('day', tpobd.CREATED_AT), "Customer Type"
order by date_trunc('day', tpobd.CREATED_AT) asc) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "__mb_source"."Date") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("__mb_source"."Date" AS date)), "__mb_source"."Customer Type" ORDER BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "__mb_source"."Date") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("__mb_source"."Date" AS date)) ASC, "__mb_source"."Customer Type" ASC

SELECT "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__SOURCE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__SOURCE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."MONDAY" AS "MONDAY" FROM (SELECT current_date - ((6 + cast(extract(dow FROM current_date) AS int)) % 7) as week_of,
        cycle, 'Ellie' as Monday,'Luiggi' as Tuesday, 'Flamber' as Wednesday,
    CASE
               WHEN cycle = 0 THEN 'Ellie'
               WHEN cycle = 1 THEN 'Luiggi'
               WHEN cycle = 2 THEN 'Flamber'
    END Thursday,
    CASE
               WHEN cycle = 0 THEN 'Flamber'
               WHEN cycle = 1 THEN 'Ellie'
               WHEN cycle = 2 THEN 'Luiggi'
    END Friday
FROM 
(
    SELECT ((current_date - ((6 + cast(extract(dow FROM current_date) AS int)) % 7) - '2020-12-21'::timestamp)/6) % 3 as cycle
)) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" = ?) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= ?) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < ?) LIMIT 1048575

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", AVG("__mb_source"."Unit Price" - (CAST("__mb_source"."Products__PRICE" AS double) / 2.0)) AS "avg" FROM (SELECT CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS double) / NULLIF(CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS double), 0.0) AS "Unit Price", "Products"."PRICE" AS "Products__PRICE", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" WHERE (("Products"."TITLE" LIKE ?) OR ("Products"."TITLE" LIKE ?)) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= ?) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < ?)) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT (FLOOR((("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" - 1.0) / 0.5)) * 0.5) + 1.0 AS "RATING", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" GROUP BY (FLOOR((("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" - 1.0) / 0.5)) * 0.5) + 1.0 ORDER BY (FLOOR((("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" - 1.0) / 0.5)) * 0.5) + 1.0 ASC

SELECT (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__PRICE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 ORDER BY (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 ASC

WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? END AS "Year", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE (CASE WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -2, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? END IS NOT NULL) AND ((CASE WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -2, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? END <> ?) OR (CASE WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -2, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? WHEN ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) THEN ? SELECT extract(month from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -2, NOW())) AND DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -1, NOW())) AND NOT (DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") = DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -1, NOW()))) THEN 1 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "2019 Orders", SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -3, NOW())) AND DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -1, NOW())) AND NOT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -2, NOW())) AND DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', -1, NOW())) THEN 1 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "2018 Orders" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY extract(month from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY extract(month from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT count(distinct "People"."ID") AS "Total Customer", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "__mb_source"."sum" > 100 THEN "People"."ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct "People"."ID") AS double), 0.0) AS "% High Spenders" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum", MIN(DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT")) AS "min" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC, "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" ASC) AS "__mb_source" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People" ON "__mb_source"."USER_ID" = "People"."ID"

SELECT "__mb_source"."ID" AS "ID", "__mb_source"."JOIN_DATE" AS "JOIN_DATE", "__mb_source"."STATE" AS "STATE", "__mb_source"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "__mb_source"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "__mb_source"."ORDER_COUNT" AS "ORDER_COUNT", "__mb_source"."AVG_TOTAL" AS "AVG_TOTAL" FROM (-- we need this CTE to get calculate the total order sum and number
-- of orders to calculate the average in the select statement below.
WITH customer_info
     AS (SELECT orders.user_id    AS id,
	            people.created_at as join_date,
                people.state      AS state,
                people.source     AS source,
                Sum(orders.total) AS total,
                Count(*)          AS order_count
         FROM   orders
                LEFT JOIN people
                       ON orders.user_id = people.id
         GROUP  BY id,
                   city,
                   state,
                   zip,
                   source)
SELECT id,
       join_date,
       state,
       source,
       total,
       order_count,
	   -- get the average order total, while guarding against
	   -- dividing by zero and accidentally destroying all of reality
       ( Cast(total AS FLOAT) / CASE
                                  WHEN order_count = 0 THEN NULL
                                  ELSE order_count
                                END ) AS avg_total
FROM   customer_info
GROUP  BY id,
          join_date,
          state,
          source) AS "__mb_source" WHERE "__mb_source"."ORDER_COUNT" > 0 LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."EXPECTED_INVOICE" AS "EXPECTED_INVOICE", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."EVENT" AS "EVENT", "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP" AS "TIMESTAMP", "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."PAGE_URL" AS "PAGE_URL", "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."BUTTON_LABEL" AS "BUTTON_LABEL" FROM "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."BODY" AS "BODY", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LIMIT 1048575
SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" WHERE "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" < 300 GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", SUM("PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."EVENT" AS "EVENT", CAST("PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP" AS date) AS "TIMESTAMP", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."EVENT", CAST("PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP" AS date) ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."EVENT" ASC, CAST("PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP" AS date) ASC

SELECT "Products"."CATEGORY" AS "Products__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" GROUP BY "Products"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "Products"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" > 40 GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."STATE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__STATE", AVG("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."STATE" ORDER BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."STATE" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "Products"."CATEGORY" AS "Products__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" GROUP BY "Products"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "Products"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."custom_co" AS "custom_co", SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", CASE WHEN "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" > 2 THEN ? ELSE ? END AS "custom_co" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."custom_co" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."custom_co" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" >= 40 GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "People - User"."ID" AS "People - User__ID", "People - User"."ZIP" AS "People - User__ZIP", "People - User"."SOURCE" AS "People - User__SOURCE", "People - User"."STATE" AS "People - User__STATE", DATE_TRUNC('month', "People - User"."CREATED_AT") AS "People - User__CREATED_AT", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum", COUNT(*) AS "count", AVG("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" GROUP BY "People - User"."ID", "People - User"."ZIP", "People - User"."SOURCE", "People - User"."STATE", DATE_TRUNC('month', "People - User"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY "People - User"."ID" ASC, "People - User"."ZIP" ASC, "People - User"."SOURCE" ASC, "People - User"."STATE" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "People - User"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" / 20.0)) * 20.0 AS "TOTAL", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" / 20.0)) * 20.0, DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" / 20.0)) * 20.0 ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 AS "RATING", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY", FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC, FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 ASC

SELECT FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 AS "QUANTITY", FLOOR(("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__RATING", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__PRICE", AVG(CASE WHEN "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" >= 1 THEN "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" END) AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5, FLOOR(("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 ORDER BY FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 ASC, FLOOR(("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 ASC

SELECT (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__PRICE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", FLOOR(("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__RATING", AVG("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", FLOOR(("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 ORDER BY (FLOOR((("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" - 12.5) / 12.5)) * 12.5) + 12.5 ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, FLOOR(("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."RATING" / 0.75)) * 0.75 ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL") AS "sum", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" ASC, "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" ASC, "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" ASC
SELECT AVG("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"
SELECT AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"

SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)), "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ASC, "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", SUM("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT"), "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC, "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", AVG("__mb_source"."negative price") AS "avg" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" - 55 AS "negative price", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" LIMIT 1048575
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"

SELECT "__mb_source"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "__mb_source"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "__mb_source"."Is Aero" AS "Is Aero", "__mb_source"."Vendor - Title" AS "Vendor - Title" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", CASE WHEN "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" LIKE ? THEN ? ELSE ? END AS "Is Aero", CONCAT(COALESCE("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR", ?), ?, COALESCE("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE", ?)) Select 'SJD<>VNY' AS roundtrip_name, 2 AS booking_interval_weeks
UNION
Select 'GVA<>FAB' AS roundtrip_name, 0 AS booking_interval_weeks
UNION
Select 'GVA<>FAB' AS roundtrip_name, 0 AS booking_interval_weeks
UNION
Select 'GVA<>FAB' AS roundtrip_name, 2 AS booking_interval_weeks
UNION

UNION

UNION

UNION
Select 'GVA<>FAB' AS roundtrip_name, 10 AS booking_interval_weeks) AS "__mb_source" WHERE "__mb_source"."ROUNDTRIP_NAME" = ?) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."ROUNDTRIP_NAME", "__mb_source"."BOOKING_INTERVAL_WEEKS" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."ROUNDTRIP_NAME" ASC, "__mb_source"."BOOKING_INTERVAL_WEEKS" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "Products"."ID" AS "Products__ID", "Products"."TITLE" AS "Products__TITLE", "Products"."CATEGORY" AS "Products__CATEGORY", "Products"."PRICE" AS "Products__PRICE" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", DATEADD('month', -1, CAST("__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS datetime)) AS "Previous month" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", SUM("PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "Products"."ID" AS "Products__ID", "Products"."TITLE" AS "Products__TITLE", "Products"."CATEGORY" AS "Products__CATEGORY", "Products"."PRICE" AS "Products__PRICE" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", "__mb_source"."Previous month" AS "Previous month", "Question 6485"."sum" AS "Question 6485__sum" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", DATEADD('month', -1, CAST("__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS datetime)) AS "Previous month" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", SUM("PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC) AS "__mb_source") AS "__mb_source" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", "__mb_source"."Previous month" AS "Previous month" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", DATEADD('month', -1, CAST("__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS datetime)) AS "Previous month" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", SUM("PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC) AS "__mb_source") AS "__mb_source") AS "Question 6485" ON DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED") = DATE_TRUNC('month', "Question 6485"."Previous month") LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "__mb_source"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY "__mb_source"."LONGITUDE" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."LONGITUDE" ASC, "__mb_source"."LATITUDE" ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS "count" FROM (SELECT (FLOOR((("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" - -180.0) / 20)) * 20) + -180.0 AS "LONGITUDE", (FLOOR((("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" - 20.0) / 20)) * 20) + 20.0 AS "LATITUDE" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE" WHERE "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" = ?) SELECT "People - User"."SOURCE" AS "People - User__SOURCE", "Products"."CATEGORY" AS "Products__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" GROUP BY "People - User"."SOURCE", "Products"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "People - User"."SOURCE" ASC, "Products"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."STATE" AS "STATE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT
    orders.user_id              AS id,
    people.created_at           AS join_date,
    people.state                AS state,
    people.source               AS source,
    Sum(orders.total)           AS total,
    Count(*)                    AS order_count,
    Sum(orders.total)/Count(*)  AS avg_total
FROM orders
LEFT JOIN people
   ON orders.user_id = people.id
GROUP  BY
    id,
    city,
    state,
    zip,
    source) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."STATE" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."STATE" ASC

User"."ID" + 1) = "Invoices"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."TAX" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."TAX" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" WHERE "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."age" AS "age", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT (DATEDIFF(month, CAST("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp), NOW()) + CASE WHEN ("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" < NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) > extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? WHEN ("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" > NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) < extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? ELSE ? END) / 12 AS "age" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."age" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."age" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL", "__mb_source"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", SUM(SUM("__mb_source"."PAYMENT")) OVER (PARTITION BY "__mb_source"."ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL", "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" ASC, "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL", "__mb_source"."ACCOUNT_ID", "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" ASC, "__mb_source"."ACCOUNT_ID" ASC, "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED" ASC

THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY", DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT AVG("__mb_source"."count") AS "avg" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."TIMESTAMP") AS "TIMESTAMP", count(distinct "__mb_source"."ACCOUNT_ID") AS "count" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP") AS "TIMESTAMP", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."ACCOUNT_ID", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP") ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."ACCOUNT_ID" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP") ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."TIMESTAMP") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."TIMESTAMP") ASC) AS "__mb_source"

SELECT "People - User"."STATE" AS "People - User__STATE", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" GROUP BY "People - User"."STATE" ORDER BY "People - User"."STATE" ASC

"PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS"."TIMESTAMP") AS "TIMESTAMP", "Accounts"."COUNTRY" AS "Accounts__COUNTRY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ANALYTIC_EVENTS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "Accounts"."COUNTRY" ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."Accounts__COUNTRY", DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."TIMESTAMP") ORDER BY "__mb_source"."Accounts__COUNTRY" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."TIMESTAMP") ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."Accounts__COUNTRY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."Accounts__COUNTRY" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", (DATEDIFF(month, CAST("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp), NOW()) + CASE WHEN ("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" < NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) > extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? WHEN ("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" > NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) < extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? ELSE ? END) / 12 AS "Age", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."ID" AS "ID", "__mb_source"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "__mb_source"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "__mb_source"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "__mb_source"."TAX" AS "TAX", "__mb_source"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "__mb_source"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY" FROM (SELECT
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT",
  CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS DATE) AS "CREATED_AT",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY"
FROM
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"
LIMIT
  1048575) AS "__mb_source" WHERE ("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" >= DATEADD('month', -6, DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -1, NOW())))) AND ("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" < DATEADD('month', -6, DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))) LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__SOURCE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" ASC
SELECT AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", SUM("__mb_source"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."EXPECTED_INVOICE" AS "EXPECTED_INVOICE", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."Date Received : Month" AS "Date Received : Month", "__mb_source"."Sum of Payment" AS "Sum of Payment", "__mb_source"."Previous Sum of Payment" AS "Previous Sum of Payment", (CAST("__mb_source"."Sum of Payment" AS double) / NULLIF(CAST("__mb_source"."Previous Sum of Payment" AS double), 0.0)) - 1 AS "Percent Change" FROM (SELECT
  "source"."Date Received : Month" AS "Date Received : Month",
  "source"."Sum of Payment" AS "Sum of Payment",
  LAG("source"."Sum of Payment") OVER (ORDER BY "source"."Date Received : Month") AS "Previous Sum of Payment"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('month', "source"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "Date Received : Month",
      SUM("source"."PAYMENT") AS "Sum of Payment"
    FROM
      "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" AS "source"
   
    GROUP BY
      DATE_TRUNC('month', "source"."DATE_RECEIVED")
   
    ORDER BY
      DATE_TRUNC('month', "source"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC
  ) AS "source") AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."Quarter String" AS "Quarter String", SUM("__mb_source"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."EXPECTED_INVOICE" AS "EXPECTED_INVOICE", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", extract(year from "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "Year", extract(quarter from "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "Quarter", CONCAT(extract(year from "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED"), ?, extract(quarter from "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED")) AS "Quarter String", "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."Quarter String" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."Quarter String" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" = ?) OR ("PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" = ?) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."count" AS "count", "__mb_source"."count" + 5 AS "Count_2" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" = ?) OR ("PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" = ?) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", SUM("PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."Quarter String" AS "Quarter String", SUM("__mb_source"."PAYMENT") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", CONCAT(extract(year from "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED"), ?, extract(quarter from "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED")) AS "Quarter String" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."Quarter String" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."Quarter String" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("__mb_source"."Total + Tax") * 1.1 AS "Normalized Revenue " FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" + "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "Total + Tax", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -12, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) AND (("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" <> 0) OR ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" IS NULL))) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) AS "CREATED_AT", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__SOURCE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" GROUP BY CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date), "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ORDER BY CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ASC, "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" LIMIT 1048575
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__SOURCE", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ASC

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC
SELECT AVG("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."count" AS "count" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC) AS "__mb_source" WHERE ("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -3, NOW()))) AND ("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."EXPECTED_INVOICE" AS "EXPECTED_INVOICE", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT extract(quarter from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__ID", COUNT(*) AS "count", AVG("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY extract(quarter from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT"), "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" ORDER BY extract(quarter from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -2, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', 1, NOW()))) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."BODY" AS "BODY", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" = 1) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" = 2) LIMIT 1048575

SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) AS "CREATED_AT", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= ?) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < ?) GROUP BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)), "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."EXPECTED_INVOICE" AS "EXPECTED_INVOICE", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."BODY" AS "BODY", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."BODY" AS "BODY", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" LIMIT 1048575
