END) / 12 AS "Age", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "__mb_source"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" GROUP BY (FLOOR(("__mb_source"."Age" - 22.5) / 7.5) * 7.5) + 22.5, "Products"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY (FLOOR(("__mb_source"."Age" - 22.5) / 7.5) * 7.5) + 22.5 ASC, "Products"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', NOW())) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('quarter', DATEADD('month', CAST(1 * 3 AS integer), NOW())))

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= ?) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < ?) AND ("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" = 86) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."STATE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__STATE", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."STATE" ORDER BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."STATE" ASC

SELECT (FLOOR(("__mb_source"."count" - 30.0) / 7.5) * 7.5) + 30.0 AS "count", COUNT(*) AS "count_2" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."age" AS "age", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT (DATEDIFF(month, CAST("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp), NOW()) + CASE WHEN ("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" < NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) > extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? WHEN ("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" > NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) < extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? ELSE ? END) / 12 AS "age" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."age" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."age" ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY (FLOOR(("__mb_source"."count" - 30.0) / 7.5) * 7.5) + 30.0 ORDER BY (FLOOR(("__mb_source"."count" - 30.0) / 7.5) * 7.5) + 30.0 ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

WITH "__mb_source" ("STATE", "SOURCE", "QP", "ST", "ST_2") AS (select state, source, count(people.id) as qp, sum(tax) as st, sum(total) as st from orders left join people on orders.user_id = people.id group by state, source) SELECT "__mb_source"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", SUM("__mb_source"."ST") AS "sum" FROM "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."SOURCE" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."SOURCE" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", SUM("__mb_source"."ST") AS "sum" FROM (select state, source, count(people.id) as qp, sum(tax) as st, sum(total) as st from orders left join people on orders.user_id = people.id group by state, source) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."SOURCE" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."SOURCE" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."A1" AS "A1", "__mb_source"."A2" AS "A2", "B - A1"."B1" AS "B - A1__B1", "B - A1"."B2" AS "B - A1__B2" FROM (select 1 as a1, 2 as a2) AS "__mb_source" INNER JOIN (SELECT "__mb_source"."B1" AS "B1", "__mb_source"."B2" AS "B2" FROM (select 1 as b1, 2 as b2) AS "__mb_source") AS "B - A1" ON "__mb_source"."A1" = "B - A1"."B1" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE") AS "avg", COUNT(*) AS "count", AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING") AS "avg_2" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE") AS "avg", COUNT(*) AS "count", AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING") AS "avg_2" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE") AS "avg" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."REVIEWER" AS "REVIEWER", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."BODY" AS "BODY", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS") AS "Reviews" ON "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" = "Reviews"."PRODUCT_ID" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "People - User"."BIRTH_DATE") AS "People - User__BIRTH_DATE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "People - User"."BIRTH_DATE") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "People - User"."BIRTH_DATE") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."LogSumTotal" AS "LogSumTotal", SQRT("__mb_source"."LogSumTotal") AS "SqrtLogSumTotal" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", LOG10(SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL")) AS "LogSumTotal" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."TITLE" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__TITLE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" < 30 GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."TITLE" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."TITLE" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT"), "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" AS "ACCOUNT_ID", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PAYMENT" AS "PAYMENT", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."EXPECTED_INVOICE" AS "EXPECTED_INVOICE", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED" AS "DATE_RECEIVED", "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."EMAIL" AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID__EMAIL" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."ACCOUNT_ID" = "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."ID" WHERE "ACCOUNTS__via__ACCOUNT_ID"."LAST_NAME" LIKE ? LIMIT 1048575

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', 1, NOW()))) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT"), "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count", LAG(COUNT(*), 12) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Order count last year during this month" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."count" AS "count", "__mb_source"."Order count previous period" AS "Order count previous period", (CAST("__mb_source"."count" - "__mb_source"."Order count previous period" AS double) / NULLIF(CAST("__mb_source"."Order count previous period" AS double), 0.0)) * 100 AS "Percentage change" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count", LAG(COUNT(*), 1) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Order count previous period" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY"
FROM
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"
WHERE
  (
    "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= CAST(
      DATEADD('day', CAST(-30 AS long), CAST(NOW() AS datetime)) AS date
    )
  )
 
   AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < CAST(NOW() AS date))
LIMIT
  1048575) AS "__mb_source"

  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT",
  "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT",

      DATEADD('day', CAST(-30 AS long), CAST(NOW() AS datetime)) AS date

  )
 
   AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < CAST(NOW() AS date))
LIMIT

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum", LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Previous Sum of Total", (CAST(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS double), 0.0)) - 1 AS "Percentage Diff" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum", LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Previous Sum of Total", (CAST(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS double), 0.0)) - 1 AS "Percentage Diff" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", "__mb_source"."Order totals vs previous period" AS "Order totals vs previous period", (CAST("__mb_source"."sum" - "__mb_source"."Order totals vs previous period" AS double) / NULLIF(CAST("__mb_source"."Order totals vs previous period" AS double), 0.0)) * 100 AS "Percentage change" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum", LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Order totals vs previous period" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum", LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Previous period" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", AVG(CAST("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS double) / NULLIF(CAST("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS double), 0.0)) * 42 AS "metric v2 h2 times 42" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "Orders" ON "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" = "Orders"."PRODUCT_ID" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "__mb_source"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" = ? GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CREATED_AT") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" = ? GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID") AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", CAST(COUNT(*) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID") AS double), 0.0) AS "Avg orders by customer" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."ID" AS "ID", "__mb_source"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "__mb_source"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "__mb_source"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "__mb_source"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "__mb_source"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "__mb_source"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "__mb_source"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "__mb_source"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "__mb_source"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "__mb_source"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "__mb_source"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "__mb_source"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "__mb_source"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY", "__mb_source"."Plan Initial" AS "Plan Initial", CASE WHEN "__mb_source"."SEATS" = 1 THEN ? WHEN "__mb_source"."SEATS" = 2 THEN ? ELSE ? END AS "Seating type" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY", SUBSTRING("PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN", 1, 1) AS "Plan Initial" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "__mb_source") AS "__mb_source"

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."count" AS "count" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('year', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('year', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -12, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))

SELECT "__mb_source"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "__mb_source"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", SUM("__mb_source"."TAX") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -12, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."USER_ID", "__mb_source"."PRODUCT_ID" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."USER_ID" ASC, "__mb_source"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC

SELECT FLOOR(("__mb_source"."TOTAL" / 20.0)) * 20.0 AS "TOTAL", SUM("__mb_source"."TAX") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -12, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY FLOOR(("__mb_source"."TOTAL" / 20.0)) * 20.0 ORDER BY FLOOR(("__mb_source"."TOTAL" / 20.0)) * 20.0 ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum", LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS "Sum of Total (previous month)", (CAST(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(LAG(SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL"), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC) AS double), 0.0)) - 1 AS "Sum of Total (% vs previous month)" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") AS "DATE_RECEIVED", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."INVOICES" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN", DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."PLAN" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."INVOICES"."DATE_RECEIVED") ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."ID" AS "ID", "__mb_source"."EAN" AS "EAN", "__mb_source"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "__mb_source"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "__mb_source"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "__mb_source"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "__mb_source"."RATING" AS "RATING", "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM (select * from products) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT SUM("__mb_source"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS double) / NULLIF(CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS double), 0.0) AS "Discount Rate", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."TITLE" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__TITLE", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source"

END) / 12 AS "Age", "People - User"."SOURCE" AS "People - User__SOURCE" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."Age", "__mb_source"."People - User__SOURCE" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."Age" ASC, "__mb_source"."People - User__SOURCE" ASC

SELECT (FLOOR(("__mb_source"."Age" - 22.5) / 7.5) * 7.5) + 22.5 AS "Age", "Products"."CATEGORY" AS "Products__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", (DATEDIFF(month, CAST("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp), NOW()) + CASE WHEN ("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" < NOW()) AND (extract(day from CAST("People - User"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) > extract(day from NOW())) THEN ? SELECT "__mb_source"."min" AS "min", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."min" AS "min", SUM(SUM("__mb_source"."count")) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."min" ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS "sum" FROM (SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "__mb_source"."min") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("__mb_source"."min" AS date)) AS "min", "__mb_source"."count" AS "count" FROM (SELECT "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", count(distinct "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID") AS "count", MIN(CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) AS "min" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" ORDER BY "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" ASC, "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" ASC) AS "__mb_source") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."min" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."min" ASC) AS "__mb_source" WHERE ("__mb_source"."min" >= DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from DATEADD('week', -30, NOW())) + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST(DATEADD('week', -30, NOW()) AS date))) AND ("__mb_source"."min" < DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from NOW()) + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST(NOW() AS date))) LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__SOURCE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('year', NOW())) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('year', DATEADD('year', 1, NOW()))) GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."SOURCE" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", SUM(SUM("__mb_source"."Count only last 28 days")) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS "sum", SUM(SUM("__mb_source"."Count only prev 28 days")) OVER (ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS "sum_2" FROM (SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."Count only last 28 days" AS "Count only last 28 days", "__mb_source"."Count only prev 28 days" AS "Count only prev 28 days" FROM (SELECT CAST("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS date) AS "CREATED_AT", SUM(CASE WHEN "__mb_source"."Last 28 days" = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "Count only last 28 days", SUM(CASE WHEN "__mb_source"."Prev 28 days" = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0.0 END) AS "Count only prev 28 days" FROM (SELECT ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= CAST(DATEADD('day', -28, NOW()) AS date)) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < CAST(NOW() AS date)) AS "Last 28 days", (("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= CAST(DATEADD('day', -56, NOW()) AS date)) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < CAST(NOW() AS date))) AND NOT (("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= CAST(DATEADD('day', -28, NOW()) AS date)) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < CAST(NOW() AS date))) AS "Prev 28 days", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < NOW()) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY CAST("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ORDER BY CAST("__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ASC) AS "__mb_source") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" ASC

User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("__mb_source"."sum") AS "sum", AVG("__mb_source"."avg") AS "avg", SUM("__mb_source"."count") AS "sum_2" FROM (SELECT
      "CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY",
      DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT",
      SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum",
      AVG("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "avg",
      COUNT(*) AS "count"
    FROM
      "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"
     
LEFT JOIN "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID"
WHERE true and 1 = 1
GROUP BY
      "CATEGORY",
      DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT")
   
ORDER BY
      "CATEGORY" ASC,
      DATE_TRUNC('year', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY "__mb_source"."PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY" ASC, DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) AS "CREATED_AT", COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7) AS "CREATED_AT_2", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) GROUP BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)), COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7) ORDER BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ASC, COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7) ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."avg" AS "avg" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", AVG("__mb_source"."sum") AS "avg" FROM (SELECT CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) AS "CREATED_AT", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ORDER BY CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date) ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT SUM("__mb_source"."SEATS") AS "sum" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."FIRST_NAME" AS "FIRST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."PLAN" AS "PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_ENDS_AT" AS "TRIAL_ENDS_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."CANCELED_AT" AS "CANCELED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."TRIAL_CONVERTED" AS "TRIAL_CONVERTED", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION" AS "ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LEGACY_PLAN" AS "LEGACY_PLAN", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LAST_NAME" AS "LAST_NAME", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."SEATS" AS "SEATS", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS"."COUNTRY" AS "COUNTRY" FROM "PUBLIC"."ACCOUNTS") AS "__mb_source"

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", AVG("__mb_source"."subtracted rating") AS "avg" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."RATING" - 5 AS "subtracted rating", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", "__mb_source"."Offset" AS "Offset", COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM (SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", DATEDIFF(month, CAST("PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp), "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + CASE WHEN ("PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."BIRTH_DATE" < "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AND (extract(day from CAST("PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) > extract(day from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT")) THEN ? WHEN ("PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."BIRTH_DATE" > "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AND (extract(day from CAST("PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."BIRTH_DATE" AS timestamp)) < extract(day from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT")) THEN ? ELSE ? END AS "Offset" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID") AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT"), "__mb_source"."Offset" ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC, "__mb_source"."Offset" ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", AVG("__mb_source"."zero") AS "avg" FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 1) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 2) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 3) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 4) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 5) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 6) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 7) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 8) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 9) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 10) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 11) OR (extract(month from "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT") = 12) THEN 0 END AS "zero", "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."REVIEWS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -3, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."REVIEWS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "__mb_source"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", CAST(? AS text) AS "Quality", 100.01 AS "Min Total", 2 AS "Min Items", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", "Products"."TITLE" AS "Products__TITLE", "People - User"."NAME" AS "People - User__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "Products" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "Products"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "People - User" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "People - User"."ID" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" WHERE (LOWER("PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."TITLE") LIKE LOWER(CONCAT(?, CAST(? AS text), ?))) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" >= 100.01) AND ("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" > 2) LIMIT 1048575

SELECT "__mb_source"."count" AS "count", "__mb_source"."sum" AS "sum", SUM("__mb_source"."count") AS "sum_2" FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 AS "QUANTITY", COUNT(*) AS "count", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT"), FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC, FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 ASC) AS "__mb_source" GROUP BY "__mb_source"."count", "__mb_source"."sum" ORDER BY "__mb_source"."count" ASC, "__mb_source"."sum" ASC

SELECT "__mb_source"."COUNT(*)" AS "COUNT(*)" FROM (select count(*) from (SELECT
  "source"."count" AS "count",
  "source"."sum" AS "sum",
  SUM("source"."count") AS "sum_2"
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT",
      FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 AS "QUANTITY",
      COUNT(*) AS "count",
      SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL") AS "sum"
    FROM
      "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"
   
GROUP BY
      DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT"),
      FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5
   
ORDER BY
      DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC,
      FLOOR(("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" / 12.5)) * 12.5 ASC
  ) AS "source"
GROUP BY
  "source"."count",
  "source"."sum"
ORDER BY
  "source"."count" ASC,
  "source"."sum" ASC)) AS "__mb_source" LIMIT 1048575

SELECT AVG("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE") AS "Goal value" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS" WHERE ("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATEADD('month', -12, NOW()))) AND ("PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()))

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count", SUM("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL") AS "sum" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") ASC

SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."SUBTOTAL" AS "SUBTOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TAX" AS "TAX", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."TOTAL" AS "TOTAL", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."DISCOUNT" AS "DISCOUNT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."QUANTITY" AS "QUANTITY", extract(year from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") AS "year", "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."NAME" AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID__NAME" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."NAME" AS "NAME", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."BIRTH_DATE" AS "BIRTH_DATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ADDRESS" AS "ADDRESS", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."CITY" AS "CITY", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."EMAIL" AS "EMAIL", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LATITUDE" AS "LATITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."LONGITUDE" AS "LONGITUDE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."SOURCE" AS "SOURCE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."STATE" AS "STATE", "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE"."ZIP" AS "ZIP" FROM "PUBLIC"."PEOPLE") AS "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."USER_ID" = "PEOPLE__via__USER_ID"."ID" LIMIT 1048575
SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC
SELECT "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" AS "PRODUCT_ID", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ORDER BY "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" ASC

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__PRICE", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY", "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC, "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."PRICE" ASC

SELECT "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID__CATEGORY", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."ID" AS "ID", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."TITLE" AS "TITLE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CATEGORY" AS "CATEGORY", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."VENDOR" AS "VENDOR", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."PRICE" AS "PRICE", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."RATING" AS "RATING", "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS"."CREATED_AT" AS "CREATED_AT" FROM "PUBLIC"."PRODUCTS") AS "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID" ON "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."PRODUCT_ID" = "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."ID" GROUP BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ORDER BY "PRODUCTS__via__PRODUCT_ID"."CATEGORY" ASC

SELECT DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) AS "CREATED_AT", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM "PUBLIC"."ORDERS" GROUP BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ORDER BY DATEADD('day', (1 - COALESCE(NULLIF((extract(iso_day_of_week from "PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT") + 1) % 7, 0), 7)), CAST("PUBLIC"."ORDERS"."CREATED_AT" AS date)) ASC
